name: Libgen: Book Search
summary: Search a Libgen (libgen.li-family) mirror by title/author/ISBN and return candidate book rows with format, size, language, md5, and mirror/file URLs.
description: Drives the real Libgen search box on the homepage (type -> submit) and reads the server-rendered results table (table#tablelibgen). Returns one row per file with title, author, publisher, year, language, pages, size, extension, md5, the edition page URL, and the file detail URL. Optionally filters to a single format (e.g. epub). Pure read; feed a chosen row's query/format into libgen/download. The base mirror URL is configurable because Libgen domains rotate.

query.description: Search text: book title, author, or ISBN. Searches all columns (title, author, series, year, publisher, isbn), so 'title author' works well.

base_url.description: Base URL of the Libgen mirror to use (libgen.li-family layout). Defaults to https://libgen.li/. Override when the domain rotates, e.g. https://libgen.gs/ or https://libgen.la/. Include the trailing slash.

format.description: Optional extension filter, lowercased and matched exactly against the Ext. column (e.g. epub, pdf, mobi, azw3, djvu). Empty (default) returns all formats.

limit.description: Maximum number of rows to return. Defaults to 25 (one results page). Hard cap 100.

steps.name: Navigate to the Libgen mirror homepage
Type the query into the search box

help.summary: Search a Libgen mirror; returns candidate book rows with md5 + format.

examples.description: Find epub editions of a title
examples.command: rzn-browser run libgen search --param query="Brave New World Huxley" --param format=epub

examples.description: Search a different mirror when libgen.li is down
examples.command: rzn-browser run libgen search --param query="Sapiens Harari" --param base_url="https://libgen.gs/"

returns: Object: { layout_ok, query, format, count, results: [{ title, author, publisher, year, language, pages, size, ext, md5, edition_url, file_url }] }. layout_ok=false means base_url is not a libgen.li-family mirror — try another base_url.
notes: Drives the homepage search box and submits the form (the default form searches all columns: title/author/series/year/publisher/isbn).
md5 is parsed from the row's native libgen.li mirror link; feed query+format into libgen/download to fetch the file.
If layout_ok is false the mirror DOM was not recognized — pass a different base_url.
No CDP; all JS runs in the page main world.
